device_name: EPIQ Series Diagnostic Ultrasound Systems; Affiniti Series Diagnostic Ultrasound Systems
intended_use: The intended use of EPIQ Ultrasound Diagnostic System is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications including Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fe
intended_use_full: The intended use of EPIQ Ultrasound Diagnostic System is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications including Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fetal), Cardiac Pediatric, Cerebral Vascular, Cephalic (Adult), Cephalic (Neonatal), Fetal/Obstetric, Gynecological, Intraoperative (Vascular), Intraoperative (Cardiac), intra-luminal, intra-cardiac echo, Musculoskeletal (Conventional), Musculoskeletal (Superficial), Ophthalmic, Other: Urology, Pediatric, Peripheral Vessel, Small Organ (Breast, Thyroid, Testicle), Transesophageal (Cardiac), Transrectal, Transvaginal, Lung.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction and regional wall motion abnormalities
ground_truth: For Smart View Select: manual clip selection and semi-automated processing with AutoStrain LV software by three clinical expert reviewers (averaged across reviewers). For Segmental Wall Motion: LVivo SWM (DiA Imaging Analysis) application processed by three clinical expert reviewers (averaged across reviewers).
other_metrics: For Smart View Select: Pearson correlation coefficient 0.911 (95% CI 0.855-0.946) for Global Longitudinal Strain (GLS) and 0.941 (95% CI 0.903-0.965) for Ejection Fraction (EF). For Segmental Wall Motion: Pearson correlation coefficient 0.957 (95% CI 0.933-0.972) for manual clip workflow and 0.913 (95% CI 0.857-0.948) for SVS clip workflow, both compared to ground truth LVivo SWM application.
